result.stdout:
gitci
  Git tools for ci

Usage:
  gitci [options] [command]

Options:
  --project <project>   The project root path
  --branch <branch>     The project git branch. Default is current branch 
  --include-prerelease  Whether include prerelease tags [default: False]
  --version             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

Commands:
  version
  release
  git
  minify

result.stdout:
changes
  Extracting Git commit history

Usage:
  gitci [options] git changes

Options:
  --target-paths <target-paths>
  --format <format>              The changes output to (markdown/json). default is markdown file. [default: markdown]
  --output <output>
  --project <project>            The project root path
  --branch <branch>              The project git branch. Default is current branch 
  --include-prerelease           Whether include prerelease tags [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
